description: The 'Ndrina Di Giovine is a Calabrian 'Ndrangheta clan based in Reggio Calabria, with branches in northern Italy (Milan) and abroad (United States). It engages in drug and arms trafficking. Women, notably Maria Serraino, have played a leading role in the clan's history. The clan was involved in heroin trafficking from Milan in the 1970s and later expanded into hashish and cocaine.

country_links.context: The organization sourced cocaine from Colombia.

country_links.evidence_quote: trafficava in hashish dal Marocco all' Inghilterra
country_links.context: The organization sourced hashish from Morocco.

country_links.evidence_quote: Nel 1992 a Faro , in Portogallo , Emilio Di Giovine è arrestato con il fratello Guglielmo
country_links.context: The organization's boss Emilio Di Giovine was arrested in Portugal, indicating presence.

country_links.evidence_quote: in Spagna c'era il figlio Emilio che trafficava in hashish dal Marocco all' Inghilterra e cocaina dalla Colombia per Milano
country_links.context: The organization's member Emilio Di Giovine trafficked hashish from Morocco to England and cocaine from Colombia to Milan via Spain.

country_links.evidence_quote: Gli inquirenti ritrovano nelle banche di Zurigo tracce del passaggio di decine di miliardi di proprietà dei clan
country_links.context: The organization laundered money through banks in Zurich.

country_links.evidence_quote: i Di Giovine in collaborazione con la cosca dei Morabito comprarono eroina dalla Siria
country_links.context: The organization bought heroin from Syria.

country_links.evidence_quote: trafficava in hashish dal Marocco all' Inghilterra
country_links.context: The organization trafficked hashish from Morocco to England.

country_links.evidence_quote: con ramificazioni al nord, come a Milano e all'estero, negli Stati Uniti
country_links.context: The 'ndrina has branches in the United States.
